title: PRIMARY CARE CLINICS - 211info
text: MULTNOMAH COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT NORTH PORTLAND HEALTH CENTER PRIMARY CARE CLINICS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides primary medical care for adults and children, as well as immunizations, mental health services (evaluations and counseling), women's reproductive health (Pap tests, breast exams), family planning, contraception, pregnancy testing, prenatal services, and drug and alcohol assessments. Also assists in applying for the Oregon Health Plan and private insurance plans on the Federal Health Exchange. 9000 N Lombard Street Portland, OR 97203 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm (503) 988-5558 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 988-5558 Main phone (503) 988-5305 FAX Main phone (503) 988-5558 Medical Billing Customer Service (503) 988-4753 Option 2 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP, Medicare and private insurances. $35 office visit fee applies for uninsured patients and sliding scale fees are available to cover the remaining costs. No one will be turned away for inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Proof of income if applying for sliding scale fees. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Multnomah County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus lines 4, 16, 17, 44, 75 Services: Assessment for Substance Use Disorders Breast Examinations Childhood Immunization Mental Health Evaluation Pap Tests Pediatrics Prenatal Care Public Clinics Vaccine Information Vaccine Information Well Baby Care Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - OREGON SCREENWISE PROGRAM PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MULTNOMAH COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT NORTH PORTLAND HEALTH CENTER
